class.description: Incremental Wavefront Frontier Detector (WFD). BFS from the robot's current position through free costmap cells; labels free cells adjacent to unknown cells as frontier cells; clusters adjacent frontier cells and discards small clusters. Runtime params (plugin_params.yaml): wavefront_frontier_detector.min_frontier_size wavefront_frontier_detector.clustering_distance wavefront_frontier_detector.search_distance

Scores a frontier by counting unknown cells visible from the frontier centroid via radial ray-casting through the global costmap. Runtime params (plugin_params.yaml): information_gain.weight information_gain.max_ray_length_m information_gain.num_rays
Penalises frontiers by their Euclidean distance from the robot. Returns weight * distance (weight is typically negative). Runtime params (plugin_params.yaml): euclidean.weight
